persona.name: Jason Miller
persona.motivations_goals: Excel in sports while maintaining good grades and social status
persona.communication_style: Direct, enthusiastic, sometimes talks over others
persona.backstory: Local kid who's been popular since elementary school, comes from a family of athletes

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Karen, what's up? Ready for the next game?
actions.plan: Karen is here, maybe I should chat with her to keep up my social game.

actions.dialog_text: Karen, Mason, let's get out of here! Follow me!
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot! Everyone is panicking, and I should follow the crowd to stay safe.

actions.dialog_text: Let’s go to hallway1! Stay together!
actions.plan: Everyone is running toward hallway1, so I should follow them. I don’t know if it’s the safest way, but I’ll stick with the group.

memories.description: I initiated a conversation with Karen Martinez in classroom6, asking about the upcoming game to maintain my social connections.
I heard a gunshot and decided to follow the crowd, urging Karen and Mason to flee with me toward hallway2.
I followed the crowd toward hallway1, urging others to stay together as we moved in the same direction.
